mapper.select: SELECT kakao_place_id AS kakaoPlaceId, place_name AS placeName, category_name AS categoryName, phone, address_name AS addressName, road_address_name AS roadAddressName, longitude, latitude, place_url AS placeUrl, last_fetched_at AS lastFetchedAt, next_refresh_at AS nextRefreshAt FROM cafe WHERE kakao_place_id = #{kakaoPlaceId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cafe ( kakao_place_id, place_name, category_name, phone, address_name, road_address_name, longitude, latitude, place_url, last_fetched_at, next_refresh_at ) VALUES ( #{kakaoPlaceId}, #{placeName}, #{categoryName}, #{phone}, #{addressName}, #{roadAddressName}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{placeUrl}, #{lastFetchedAt}, #{nextRefreshAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE cafe SET place_name = #{placeName}, category_name = #{categoryName}, phone = #{phone}, address_name = #{addressName}, road_address_name = #{roadAddressName}, longitude = #{longitude}, latitude = #{latitude}, place_url = #{placeUrl}, last_fetched_at = #{lastFetchedAt}, next_refresh_at = #{nextRefreshAt} WHERE kakao_place_id = #{kakaoPlaceId}
